purpose: Coordinate parallel Codex lanes toward one cohesive authored experience.
principles: Prefer emotional cohesion over feature volume.
Protect readability, softness, calmness, and focal hierarchy.
Treat duplicate cleverness as risk until integrated intentionally.
Keep runtime systems stable unless explicitly approved.

lanes.name: Bike readability + repair visuals
lanes.focus: BMX identity, bike silhouette, repair clarity, mechanic feedback
risk_watch: repair effects competing with world staging

lanes.name: Foundation environment + composition
lanes.focus: baseline environment composition, calm neighborhood readability, spatial hierarchy

lanes.name: Garage emotional staging
lanes.focus: garage mood, workshop hierarchy, emotionally grounded staging

lanes.name: Environmental storytelling
lanes.focus: small world details, authored hints, emotional context

lanes.name: UI / HUD polish
lanes.focus: HUD readability, overlays, prompts, player-facing feedback

lanes.name: Camera + game feel
lanes.focus: camera comfort, motion feel, responsiveness, readable pacing

lanes.name: NPC humanization
lanes.focus: NPC presence, small human beats, social warmth

lanes.name: Swarm orchestration + integration
lanes.focus: cross-lane convergence, merge readiness, cohesion, conflict prevention
risk_watch: too many good ideas landing together
